# Minimal Style — PPT Template Specs

## Font Pairing
- Heading: Helvetica Neue (or Arial as fallback)
- Body: Helvetica Neue (or Arial)
- Data/numbers: Helvetica Neue

## Color Palette (NO # prefix)
- Primary: "1A1A1A" (near black)
- Accent 1: "999999" (medium gray)
- Accent 2: "CCCCCC" (light gray)
- Background: "FAFAFA" (off-white)
- Dark text: "1A1A1A"
- Light text: "FFFFFF"
- Subtle: "F0F0F0"

## Slide Elements
- Single thin accent line: bottom of slide, 1pt, "CCCCCC"
- No colored shapes or bars
- Emphasis through typography size and whitespace
- Page numbers: bottom-center, 9pt, "BBBBBB"

## Slide Types
- Title: Large title (40pt, light weight), minimal subtitle (14pt), lots of space
- Section: Section name only (28pt), centered, maximum whitespace
- Content: Title (20pt) + bullets (14pt) + whitespace (no shapes)
- Table: Title + borderless table (top/bottom rules only)
- Highlight: Oversized number (80pt) or single sentence (24pt), centered
- Closing: Single line centered, small text

## Layout Rules
- Max 4 bullets per slide (embrace whitespace)
- Extra margins: 1.2" left/right, 0.8" top/bottom
- No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects
- Images: full-bleed or very small with large margins
- Transition: none or simple fade only
